intro: Fischl is a 4-star Electro Bow sub-DPS whose Elemental Skill summons Oz, a raven that deals continuous off-field Electro damage. Her A4 passive triggers an extra Electro attack every time your active character triggers an Electro-related reaction — making her the best Aggravate enabler in the game. She's also an excellent battery, generating massive Electro particles for energy-hungry teammates like Yae Miko and Beidou. Despite being a 1.0 character, Fischl remains top-tier and is present in almost every Electro-based team composition.
weapon_bottom_line: Aqua Simulacra provides massive CD and universal DMG bonus. The Stringless R5 is the best 4-star with EM + Skill/Burst DMG. For pure support, Elegy for the End provides team EM and ATK buffs.

weapons.name: Aqua Simulacra
weapons.notes: Massive CD + universal 20% DMG bonus. Best for personal damage. Oz snapshots the buff.

weapons.name: The Stringless R5
weapons.notes: Best 4-star. 48% Skill + Burst DMG. Oz counts as Skill DMG. EM substat helps Aggravate.

weapons.name: Polar Star
weapons.notes: High base ATK + CR. Fischl can easily stack the passive with Oz + charged shots. Strong alternative.

weapons.name: Favonius Warbow
weapons.notes: Support option. Generates team energy. Use if your team needs more battery power.

artifact_why: Best for off-field Fischl. 70% Elemental Skill DMG — Oz deals all of Fischl's damage as Skill DMG. Massive boost.
artifact_alt: 2pc ATK% + 2pc Electro DMG — easier to farm with good substats. Competitive if Golden Troupe substats are bad.

main_stats.sands_note: ATK% generally. EM sands if pure Aggravate team with low ATK buffs.

sub_priority: 4. Energy Recharge — not needed, Oz generates enough

teams.name: Aggravate
teams.desc: The team where Fischl shines brightest. Her A4 triggers on every Aggravate, doubling her damage output. Nahida provides EM. Kazuha/Sucrose buffs Electro DMG.

teams.name: Taser
teams.desc: Classic Taser. Sucrose drives with normal attacks. Fischl + Beidou provide off-field Electro. Xingqiu provides Hydro. Massive AoE Electro-Charged damage.

teams.name: Overload (Chevreuse)
teams.desc: Overload team enabled by Chevreuse. Fischl provides off-field Electro. Chevreuse shreds Pyro/Electro RES.

rotation_code: Nahida E+Q (EM buff) → Kazuha E+Q (Electro swirl) → Fischl E (summon Oz) → Keqing/Yae combo → Fischl Q (refresh Oz) → Repeat
rotation_key: Alternate Fischl's E and Q to maintain 100% Oz uptime. Use Q to reposition Oz if enemies move. Oz snapshots — cast him after all buffs are active.
mistakes: Not refreshing Oz — Oz has 10s (12s at C6) duration. Fischl's Q is used purely to refresh Oz, not for damage.
Casting E before buffs — Oz snapshots. Always apply team buffs before summoning Oz for maximum damage.
Building ER on Fischl — she generates so many particles that ER is wasted. 100% base ER is sufficient.
Using ATK goblet — Electro DMG goblet is always better for sub-DPS Fischl.

seo.title: Fischl Build Guide — Best Weapons, Artifacts, Teams | GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Fischl build guide for Genshin Impact v5.6. Best weapons, Golden Troupe artifacts, Aggravate and Taser team compositions, rotation guide.
